name: @umbraculum/media
description: Shared media assets framework for web and native apps (manifest + asset loader). Current asset content is brewery-flavored; content split deferred to second-vertical landing per sub-plan #9 §1.4.

scripts.build: node scripts/generate-manifest.mjs && tsup src/index.ts src/manifest.ts --format esm,cjs --dts --out-dir dist --clean --tsconfig tsconfig.build.json
